'''tamulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:rabiz|rabiz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rabiz|rabiz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tamulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmilith|tæmilith]] || [[word:tæmilij|tæmilij]] || [[word:tæmilish|tæmilish]] || [[word:tæmili|tæmili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamumuluth|tamumuluth]] || [[word:tamumuluj|tamumuluj]] || [[word:tamumulush|tamumulush]] || [[word:tamumulu|tamumulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamuluth|tamuluth]] || [[word:tamuluj|tamuluj]] || [[word:tamulush|tamulush]] || [[word:tamulu|tamulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamufluth|tamufluth]] || [[word:tamufluj|tamufluj]] || [[word:tamuflush|tamuflush]] || [[word:tamufluf|tamufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamuluthu|tamuluthu]] || [[word:tamuluju|tamuluju]] || [[word:tamulushu|tamulushu]] || [[word:tamuluku|tamuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamuluth|tamuluth]] || [[word:tamuluj|tamuluj]] || [[word:tamulush|tamulush]] || [[word:tamulu|tamulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamuluthul|tamuluthul]] || [[word:tamulujul|tamulujul]] || [[word:tamulushul|tamulushul]] || [[word:tamulukul|tamulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamuluthuthu|tamuluthuthu]] || [[word:tamulujuju|tamulujuju]] || [[word:tamulushushu|tamulushushu]] || [[word:tamuluku|tamuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamuluthun|tamuluthun]] || [[word:tamulujun|tamulujun]] || [[word:tamulushun|tamulushun]] || [[word:tamulukun|tamulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamuluthuoro|tamuluthuoro]] || [[word:tamulujuoro|tamulujuoro]] || [[word:tamulushuoro|tamulushuoro]] || [[word:tamulukuoro|tamulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
